value: CODE SNIPPET P3201.3 Trap Setting and Protection Texas Windstorm Insurance Association Residential Code 2024 > Chapter 32 Traps > Section P3201 Fixture Traps > P3201.3 Trap Setting and Protection Go To Full Code Chapter Traps shall be set level with respect to their water seals and shall be protected from freezing. Trap seals shall be protected from siphonage, aspiration or back pressure by an approved system of venting (see Section P3101 ).
